title: App Settings - General - Account
scenario: Account section under App Settings displays 'Log in' button and 'Share Data' toggle for quest users
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the Menu icon (hamburger) or your profile avatar to access App Settings.
Observe the toggle button and description text.
Tap the back button (top-left or system back).
expected: As a quest (guest) user, the 'Your Account' section displays an active 'Log in' button and the message "You are not currently logged in". The 'Share Data' section is present with a toggle button and a description about sharing basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) to help improve the experience, noting no personal information is shared with third parties. Tapping back returns the user to the App Settings page.
